description_long: This is a military-style, single-fuselage airplane with a streamlined, olive-green body and distinctive German Luftwaffe insignia on the wings and fuselage. The aircraft features a mid-mounted, straight wing configuration with two prominent jet engines mounted beneath the wings. The tail section is equipped with a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a slightly raised canopy. The surface of the airplane is matte with visible panel lines and subtle weathering, giving it a realistic metallic appearance. No landing gear is visible, suggesting it may be retracted or not modeled in this representation.
description: A military-style, olive-green jet airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, twin underwing engines, and a forward enclosed cockpit. Features Luftwaffe insignia and a conventional tail design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the twin jet engines under the wings, the vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the streamlined tail section.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the mid-mounted wings, underwing engines, Luftwaffe insignia, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the nose, forward cockpit, wing span, and the symmetrical placement of the engines beneath the wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the wing, engine, insignia, and the tail's internal structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy.
